title: Channel Capability Baseline
objective: Prove OpenClaw's shared message-channel capability catalog matches the source declarations and passes the shared channel contract tests before adapter-specific conformance runs.

phases.title: OpenClaw Channel Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Inspect OpenClaw's channel message source declarations, run the shared channel contract tests, and emit one capability proof row per OpenClaw baseline capability.
evidence: OpenClaw channel capability catalog source match
OpenClaw channel message contract test result
